task_objective: Verify report generation with 5M row dataset after default changes
design_decisions: Verified that 'Full' reports now include expensive checks (Spearman, Monotonicity) by default on datasets > 1M rows (tested with 5M).
Verified that 'Minimal' reports exclude these checks by default.
Verified that explicit flags (correlations=False, monotonicity=False) correctly override the defaults.
results: All reports generated successfully. 5M row full report completed in ~8.6s including all expensive metrics.
